title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Deleting devices
scenario: Device list correctly updates connected/disconnected state and allows deletion of remaining devices after removing one of multiple paired devices
steps: 1. Pair and connect at least 3 Bluetooth audio devices to the phone via the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
3. Power off 2 of the 3 connected devices.
4. On the Home screen, locate the device list and delete one of the devices (e.g., tap the device and select Remove/Delete).
5. Observe the remaining devices in the list.
6. Attempt to delete each of the remaining devices one by one from the device list.
expected: The deleted device is properly removed from the device list. The remaining devices are still displayed with correct connected/disconnected state (e.g., the powered-off devices show as disconnected, the powered-on device shows as connected). All remaining devices can be successfully deleted from the list without errors.
